commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex prompt-timeout final-assistant recovery in the embedded runner, a focused incomplete-turn regression test, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: Partially: current main source shows the timeout branch can win before terminal payload projection, and the PR adds a focused mocked regression for the Form B shape. I did not run a live gpt-5.5 Codex/OAuth long-reply repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can preserve existing payloads in the recovered timeout path and add one focused regression without changing the broader Codex timeout policy.

target.title: fix(codex): recover final text after prompt timeout
target.body:
Summary
- Recover a completed final assistant text payload when a prompt timeout races Codex app-server completion and the runner already has final `stop`/`end_turn`/`completed` assistant text.
- Keep pure prompt silence, or timeout cases without successful final assistant text, on the existing timeout error path.
- Add regression coverage and a changelog entry for the #84516 Form B failure mode.

Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 timeout 300s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts -t "prompt timeout races completion|strict-agentic blocked exit|empty assistant"`
- `CI=1 timeout 300s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`
- Crabbox/Testbox: pending before ready-for-review.

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Codex app-server timeout race where final assistant text is captured with a successful `stop`/`end_turn`/`completed` finish, but payload projection is empty and downstream channels receive an empty timeout envelope.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw focused runner tests in a fresh gwt worktree; remote Crabbox/Testbox proof pending before ready-for-review.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused timeout-race regression and then the full incomplete-turn runner suite listed in Verification.
Evidence after fix: the new regression returns `payloads: [{ text: finalText }]`, preserves `finalAssistantVisibleText`/`finalAssistantRawText`, reports liveness `working`, and records the execution attempt as assistant-stage success.
Observed result after fix: completed final assistant text is promoted into the terminal payload path instead of being replaced by a timeout error when completion and prompt timeout race.
What was not tested: live reporter gpt-5.5 OAuth long reply / Telegram outbound. The Form A pure-silence case with no assistant text remains timeout behavior by design.

Refs #84516.
target.author: vincentkoc
